metadata.description: Autonomous AI development system for Claude Code — self-improving pipeline from product request to production code

plugins.name: autonomous-dev
plugins.description: Autonomous AI development system — continuously-running, self-improving development pipeline that receives product requests, decomposes them through PRD→TDD→Plan→Spec→Code, reviews at every gate, monitors production, and generates its own improvement PRDs.

plugins.name: autonomous-dev-assist
plugins.description: Expert assistance, troubleshooting, and eval harness for the autonomous-dev plugin. Answers questions about commands, configuration, agents, pipeline phases, and common issues. Includes an eval framework to validate skill accuracy over time.
